title: helianthemum myrtifolium subsp. marifolium
intro: Helianthemum myrtifolium subsp. marifolium, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
